+++ b/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
@@ -270,39 +270,163 @@
   knight: KNIGHT_SPRITE,
   healer: HEALER_SPRITE,
   sentinel: SENTINEL_SPRITE,
-  nobility: NOBILITY_SPRITE,
-  squire: SQUIRE_SPRITE,
-  scribe: SCRIBE_SPRITE,
-  judge: JUDGE_SPRITE,
-  blacksmith: BLACKSMITH_SPRITE,
+  nobility: NOBILITY_SPRITE,
+  squire: SQUIRE_SPRITE,
+  scribe: SCRIBE_SPRITE,
+  judge: JUDGE_SPRITE,
+  blacksmith: BLACKSMITH_SPRITE,
 };
-
-const PALETTE_MAP: Record<CharacterType, Record<string, string>> = {
-  king:       charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#8B6914', '#c0392b', '#f1c40f', '#f39c12', '#8B0000'),
-  knight:     charPalette('#e0b088', '#3a2510', '#7f8c8d', '#bdc3c7', '#2980b9'),
-  healer:     charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#f5e6ca', '#ecf0f1', '#3498db', '#2ecc71'),
-  sentinel:   charPalette('#d4a574', '#1a1a1a', '#2c3e50', '#34495e', '#e74c3c'),
-  nobility:   charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#4a3728', '#8e44ad', '#d4a8e0', '#f0c040'),
-  squire:     charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#c0763a', '#27ae60', '#8B7355', '#e0d6c2'),
-  scribe:     charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#6b4226', '#8B7355', '#d4c5a9', '#2c3e50'),
-  judge:      charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#888888', '#1a1a2e', '#e0d6c2', '#c0392b'),
-  blacksmith: charPalette('#c89060', '#1a1a1a', '#555555', '#f39c12', '#e74c3c'),
-};
-
-// ─── Drawing engine ────────────────────────────────────────────────
-
-function drawSpriteDef(
-  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
-  sprite: string[],
-  palette: Record<string, string>,
-  x: number, y: number, s: number,
-  flipH = false,
-) {
-  const w = sprite[0]?.length ?? 16;
-  const ps = Math.ceil(s);
-  for (let row = 0; row < sprite.length; row++) {
-    const line = sprite[row];
-    for (let col = 0; col < line.length; col++) {
-      const ch = line[col];
-      if (ch === ' ' || ch === '0') continue;
-      const color = palette[ch];
-      if (!color) continue;
-      const px = flipH ? x + (w - 1 - col) * s : x + col * s;
-      ctx.fillStyle = color;
-      ctx.fillRect(Math.round(px), Math.round(y + row * s), ps, ps);
-    }
-  }
-}
+const PALETTE_MAP: Record<CharacterType, Record<string, string>> = {
+  king:       charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#8B6914', '#c0392b', '#f1c40f', '#f39c12', '#8B0000'),
+  knight:     charPalette('#e0b088', '#3a2510', '#7f8c8d', '#bdc3c7', '#2980b9'),
+  healer:     charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#f5e6ca', '#ecf0f1', '#3498db', '#2ecc71'),
+  sentinel:   charPalette('#d4a574', '#1a1a1a', '#2c3e50', '#34495e', '#e74c3c'),
+  nobility:   charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#4a3728', '#8e44ad', '#d4a8e0', '#f0c040'),
+  squire:     charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#c0763a', '#27ae60', '#8B7355', '#e0d6c2'),
+  scribe:     charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#6b4226', '#8B7355', '#d4c5a9', '#2c3e50'),
+  judge:      charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#888888', '#1a1a2e', '#e0d6c2', '#c0392b'),
+  blacksmith: charPalette('#c89060', '#1a1a1a', '#555555', '#f39c12', '#e74c3c'),
+};
+
+// ─── Pixel art character sprites (16x24) ─────────────────────────
+
+// Each sprite is a 16x24 grid of characters representing pixels.
+// Characters map to colors in the palette.
+// ' ' = transparent.
+
+const SPRITES: Record<CharacterType, string[]> = {

+// ─── Draw pixel art sprite with outlines and shading ─────────────
+
+function drawPixelCharacter(
+  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
+  type: CharacterType,
+  x: number,
+  y: number,
+  scale: number,
+  flipH = false,
+) {
+  const sprite = SPRITES[type];
+  if (!sprite) return;
+  const palette = PALETTE_MAP[type];
+  const w = 16;
+  const h = 24;
+  const ps = Math.ceil(scale);
+
+  // Draw outline pass first (black pixels around colored pixels)
+  ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1018'; // universal outline color
+  for (let row = 0; row < h; row++) {
+    for (let col = 0; col < w; col++) {
+      const ch = sprite[row][col];
+      if (ch === ' ' || ch === '0') continue;
+      // Check neighbors for transparency to draw outline
+      const neighbors = [
+        [row - 1, col], [row + 1, col],
+        [row, col - 1], [row, col + 1],
+        [row - 1, col - 1], [row - 1, col + 1],
+        [row + 1, col - 1], [row + 1, col + 1],
+      ];
+      for (const [nr, nc] of neighbors) {
+        if (nr < 0 || nr >= h || nc < 0 || nc >= w) {
+          // edge pixel, draw outline
+          const px = flipH ? x + (w - 1 - col) * ps : x + col * ps;
+          const py = y + row * ps;
+          ctx.fillRect(Math.round(px), Math.round(py), ps, ps);
+          break;
+        }
+        const nch = sprite[nr][nc];
+        if (nch === ' ' || nch === '0') {
+          const px = flipH ? x + (w - 1 - col) * ps : x + col * ps;
+          const py = y + row * ps;
+          ctx.fillRect(Math.round(px), Math.round(py), ps, ps);
+          break;
+        }
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  // Draw main colored pixels with shading
+  for (let row = 0; row < h; row++) {
+    for (let col = 0; col < w; col++) {
+      const ch = sprite[row][col];
+      if (ch === ' ' || ch === '0') continue;
+      const baseColor = palette[ch];
+      if (!baseColor) continue;
+      // Apply shading gradient: top rows lighter, bottom darker
+      let shadeFactor = 0;
+      if (row < 6) shadeFactor = 15; // highlight head top
+      else if (row > 18) shadeFactor = -15; // shadow legs
+      else shadeFactor = 0;
+      const color = shadeColor(baseColor, shadeFactor);
+      ctx.fillStyle = color;
+      const px = flipH ? x + (w - 1
